ques: Find a route from Miami to New Orleans, and provide the detailed route information.
answer: Driving route Miami → New Orleans: 12 h 41 min, 868 miles via I-10 W (fastest, has tolls, destination in a different time zone). Steps: (1) Take I-95 N — 6 min (1.4 mi); (2) Take Florida's Tpke, I-75 N and I-10 W toward Cleveland Ave, exit 235B from I-10 W — 12 h 14 min (866 mi); (3) Continue on Cleveland Ave to Loyola Ave — 4 min (0.7 mi), arriving New Orleans, LA.
